name: Vegetable Fish Filets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place filets in a single layer in an oiled 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Heat oil in a separate pan and sauté onion, zucchini, and green peppers until crisp-tender. Spoon the vegetables over the fish filets.
3. Top with chopped tomatoes.
4. In a bowl, combine sherry (if using), lemon juice, salt, basil, pepper, and hot pepper sauce. Pour this mixture over the fish.
5. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Remove fish and vegetables to a heated platter. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese if desired.
7. Serve pan juices over bulgur or rice, if desired.
